study.title: NKI Rockland sub-A00039636 T1 MPRAGE Curated Anatomy Targets
study.curationNote: Human-editable target database for the finalized review bundle. Set includeInViewer=false to temporarily remove a structure from the viewer. Use quizQuestions for optional revealable teaching prompts.
